title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: A video explainer covering Pi, an agent framework that enables different use cases like OpenClaw. The video compares Pi against frontier agent tools like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, and discusses how the harness layer complexity affects these products.
